notes.heading: CMD launches directly
notes.body: Install and update tasks now spawn a detached visible cmd.exe window directly instead of relying on a hidden start/wait wrapper.

notes.heading: Better troubleshooting details
notes.body: The Console tab now records the exact command and temporary script path used for external task windows.

notes.heading: Still pauses at the end
notes.body: The external task window still pauses at the end so you can read SteamCMD's final output before it closes.
